sessions.title: Closing the Availability Gap in Oracle AI Database 26ai
sessions.speaker_bio:
Francisco Munoz Alvarez is a global technology leader specializing in Oracle Database High Availability, Disaster Recovery, and Maximum Availability Architecture (MAA). As a Distinguished Product Manager within Oracle’s Mission-Critical Data team, he leads global customer adoption strategies that help enterprises protect their most valuable asset: data.
Francisco is a recognized industry thought leader, international keynote speaker, and published writer known for translating complex technical concepts into practical business strategies. His work spans global financial institutions, government agencies, and enterprise organizations, helping them design resilient, scalable, and always-available data platforms.

Complementing his technology leadership, Francisco holds an MBA with a strong focus on marketing and business strategy, allowing him to bridge technical innovation with executive decision-making.

Outside the corporate world, Francisco competes internationally representing Australia in Dragon Boat World Championships. This elite sporting experience heavily influences his leadership philosophy, emphasizing teamwork, discipline, precision, and performance under pressure.

Francisco’s presentations uniquely blend real-world technology resilience lessons with high-performance athletic principles, inspiring audiences to build systems, teams, and organizations that thrive when failure is not an option.

Mi experiencia como desarrollador suma cinco años en total, abarcando diversos proyectos y tecnologías que han fortalecido mis habilidades técnicas y de liderazgo en el sector.

Cursé la licenciatura en Ingeniería en Tecnologías Computacionales en el Tecnológico de Monterrey, campus Puebla, lo que me brindó una sólida formación en áreas clave de la computación y la ingeniería. Actualmente, continúo mi preparación académica como estudiante de la Maestría en Inteligencia Artificial Aplicada, también en el Tec de Monterrey, con el objetivo de potenciar mi conocimiento en temas de vanguardia y su aplicación en soluciones empresariales.

Mi enfoque profesional se centra en la innovación, el trabajo en equipo y la aplicación de nuevas tecnologías para resolver retos complejos y contribuir al éxito de la organización.

sessions.speaker_bio:

These days (and for quite a while now), my main focus is Oracle Database. It’s the most scalable database in the world and it never stops evolving. That means I’m always studying, experimenting, and trying to keep up. If you work with Oracle development, you know exactly what I mean — Oracle releases way more features than anyone can realistically master.

When Y2K did not end the world as people thought, he started presenting on his passions - SQL and Databases, and discovered that he loved helping and sharing his knowledge with the developer community. Since then he has spoken at over 150 conferences around the world. He splits the rest of his time between helping developers via StackOverflow and on asktom.oracle.com, creating YouTube videos and blog posts, and helping his rescue greyhound with treats, walks and cuddles.

sessions.title: Real-Time AI: Consolidating Vector Data with OGG 26ai
sessions.speaker_bio: With 20 years of experience in IT, I have spent the past 18 years specializing in Oracle Database Administration, working with versions from 8i to 23ai and earning multiple certifications (OCA, OCP, OCE, OCS). I am an Oracle GoldenGate Certified Expert with 14 years of hands-on experience, from OGG 10g to 23ai.

sessions.title: Búsqueda declarativa en APEX: el poder de las configuraciones de búsqueda
sessions.speaker_bio:
Niall McPhillips es Oracle ACE Director y miembro de Symposium 42. Cuenta con una amplia trayectoria como orador en conferencias internacionales, donde ha presentado sobre diversos temas relacionados con el uso de Oracle Database y sus tecnologías, entre ellas APEX, ORDS, PL/SQL, REST, JSON, Oracle Text, SODA y Multimedia, así como sobre su experiencia en la implementación de grandes proyectos APEX.

Trabaja con Oracle Database desde 1989, utiliza tecnologías web desarrolladas con PL/SQL desde 1995 y desarrolla con Oracle APEX desde 2005.

Ha liderado y desarrollado numerosas aplicaciones de gran escala y multilingües para empresas y organizaciones multinacionales en todo el mundo. Es un firme defensor de las soluciones basadas en PL/SQL y APEX, destacando su estabilidad, escalabilidad y velocidad de desarrollo.

sessions.title: "The Empire Strikes Back" with DBSAT 4.X and Data Safe new features
sessions.speaker_bio:
I'm a Senior IT Professional, working since year 1998 with Oracle Products and Technology, first 6 years as Consultant Developer and Systems Analyst, then last 18+ years as DBA/Database Consultant for Oracle versions from 8i to 21c, also often have had an additional non-technical role associated for either short or long periods (ie: Delivery Lead / Acting Team Manager). Since 7 years ago I joined the Oracle ACE Program / Groundbreakers, currently I'm an Oracle ACE Pro. 

Also I'm very passionate for Cybersecurity and Data Protection, I have developed expertise in Oracle Database Security, additionally I'm Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Certified Architect.

Blogger at Pythian Blogs:
https://blog.pythian.com/author/salazar/

sessions.speaker_bio:
Nelson Calero is a senior data engineer with 20+ years of extensive experience in Oracle, PostgreSQL, Google Cloud, and other database technologies.  A seasoned presenter and community leader, he shares his insight and expertise on database products at various events globally.  Nelson works as a Principal Consultant for Pythian - as the last technical team escalation point handling the Pythian client's most challenging and serious database technical problems.

He is an Oracle ACE Director and Oracle Certified Professional, a member of the Board of the Latin American Oracle User Community (LAOUC), and a leader of the Uruguayan Oracle User Group (UYOUG).
